overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through a misty forest at night. The character passes an abandoned wooden hut, crosses a small stream, and approaches distant village lights visible through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow winding trail through dense ancient forest

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with swords strapped to his back, navigating the misty woodland

entered.detail: tall dense trees forming a dark canopy overhead
narrow winding dirt trail with patches of grass
low-lying fog and mist between the trees creating atmospheric depth
large gnarled tree trunk with thick bark visible beside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense, misty forest at night. Tall trees form a dark canopy overhead with patches of sky visible through the branches, while atmospheric fog creates a moody, low-visibility environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned homestead clearing in the woods

events.description: abandoned wooden hut comes into view on the right side of the path
passing the derelict hut, revealing broken fence posts and overgrown grass

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking past the abandoned structure, glancing toward the derelict building

entered.detail: derelict wooden cabin with collapsed roof and weathered walls
massive oak with wide spreading branches leaning over the path
rotted wooden fence posts and collapsed rails near the hut

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a small clearing where an abandoned wooden hut stands on the right. Geralt passes the derelict structure and a broken fence, with a large spreading oak tree on the left, as the forest temporarily thins.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest stream crossing with wooden footbridge

events.description: path curves left and opens up near a small flowing stream
crossing a small wooden footbridge over the stream

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the wooden bridge over the stream and continuing along the winding path

entered.detail: small weathered wooden bridge crossing the stream
narrow flowing waterway with reflective surface visible through the grass
open grassy area with wildflowers alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider clearing as the path curves toward a small stream. Geralt crosses a wooden footbridge over the water, with grassy banks and scattered pine trees replacing the dense forest canopy.

events.description: warm lights from a distant village become visible through the trees on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the distant settlement lights, moving along the forest edge

entered.detail: warm orange glow of lanterns or fires from buildings in the distance
sparse coniferous trees marking the forest edge

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the forest edge with vegetation becoming sparser. Warm lights from a distant village appear on the left horizon, indicating an approaching settlement, while the terrain opens into grassland with scattered pine trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, misty forest at night that gradually opens into a sparse grassland illuminated by distant village lights. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail under a dark canopy of tall trees, where thick atmospheric fog limits visibility. As the path opens into a small clearing, the camera passes a derelict wooden hut and a broken fence before the forest thins further. The scene then expands as the trail curves toward a small stream, leading Geralt across a wooden footbridge flanked by grassy banks and scattered pine trees. Finally, the vegetation becomes sparser and the terrain opens into wide grassland, revealing warm lights from a distant settlement on the horizon.
